name: Usne Penitentiary Employees
description_short: Federal credit union serving employees of USN Penitentiary in Lewisburg, PA. Member-owned institution offering financial services to eligible members.
description_long:
USNE Penitentiary Employees Federal Credit Union (USNEP Employees FCU) is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving employees of the United States Penitentiary in Lewisburg, Pennsylvania. As a federally chartered credit union, it operates under NCUA insurance and oversight, providing financial services exclusively to eligible members within its select employee group.

The credit union operates a physical branch location in Lewisburg, PA at 30 E Court, providing in-person banking services to its membership. As a federal credit union, the institution offers typical credit union products and services to its eligible membership base. Members can contact the branch directly at (570) 523-1669 for information about hours of operation and available services.

What distinguishes USNEP Employees FCU is its focused membership model—it serves a specific employee group rather than the general public, which creates a tight-knit member community with shared professional affiliations. This specialized membership structure allows the credit union to tailor services to the unique financial needs of federal penitentiary employees. The institution's long-standing presence in Lewisburg demonstrates stability and local community commitment.

The primary limitation of this credit union is membership eligibility; it is not open to the general public and prospective members must meet specific employment-based criteria to join. The available online information is minimal, providing only basic contact and location details. Prospective members or those seeking detailed information about specific services, rates, loan products, or membership requirements should contact the branch directly, as comprehensive service details are not published on the referral directory.
services: In-person banking services at Lewisburg branch
pros: Federal credit union status with NCUA insurance protection for member deposits
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure returns profits to members rather than shareholders
Physical branch location in Lewisburg provides in-person banking services
Serves a defined employee community with shared professional interests
Long-established institution demonstrating financial stability and local presence
Direct contact available at (570) 523-1669 for member service inquiries
cons: Membership restricted to eligible employees of USN Penitentiary—not open to general public
Limited online presence and published information about specific services, rates, or loan products
Single branch location limits accessibility for members outside Lewisburg area
No details available regarding digital banking capabilities or online services
Minimal transparency about membership requirements or application process on public directories
best_for: Current and former employees of USN Penitentiary in Lewisburg, PA
Federal penitentiary staff seeking member-owned financial institution benefits
Employees looking for in-person banking services in the Lewisburg area
diagnosis: USNEP Employees FCU is best for current and former USN Penitentiary employees who meet membership eligibility criteria and seek member-owned credit union services. The primary caveat is that this institution is not publicly accessible; prospective members must verify employment-based eligibility and contact the branch directly to learn about specific services, rates, and requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Usne Penitentiary Employees — NCUA-insured credit union in LEWISBURG, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
